tools.name: v1.get
tools.description: Retrieve details for the specified Subscription

tools.name: v1.list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of Subscriptions for the specified Shopper

tools.name: v1.productGroups
tools.description: Retrieve a list of ProductGroups for the specified Shopper

tools.name: v1.update
tools.description:
Only Subscription properties that can be changed without immediate financial impact can be modified via PATCH, whereas some properties can be changed by purchasing a renewal
This endpoint only supports JWT authentication

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
